title: barleria randii
intro: Barleria randii, also known as the "Tiger's Eye" or "Butterfly Bush", is a flowering plant species native to the tropical regions of East Africa. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Barleria randii include reducing fever, relieving headaches and body aches, and treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The plant can be prepared as an infusion, decoction, or tincture, and is often used in traditional medicine in various parts of Africa.
